title: Breeding of drought-resistant peanuts. Proceedings of a Collaborative Review Meeting, Hyderabad, Andhra Pradesh, India, 25-27 February, 2002.
abstract: These proceedings contain papers presented at the conference, classified into the following major topics: selection tools and breeding methodologies (4 papers); evaluation of selections in individual environments (8 papers); and multilocation analysis and cost-benefit analysis (4 papers). Tabulated data on parents and selection method for the multi-environment trials in India and Australia are appended
funders: Australian Centre for International Agricultural Research
International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
